regime_fall.current_status: Acute crisis phase with simultaneous military escalation, economic hemorrhaging ($435M daily oil revenue loss), internal succession paralysis, and 56-day internet blackout preventing accurate damage assessment. US maintains Strait of Hormuz blockade with shoot-to-kill orders while Iran responds with retaliatory vessel seizures, but Tehran remains unable to negotiate due to internal power vacuum and hardliner leverage.
regime_fall.last_major_event: On April 23-24, 2026, the US seized Iranian oil shipments and turned back 30+ tankers (costing $435M daily), Trump ordered Navy shoot-to-kill rules of engagement against Iranian mine-laying operations, Israel declared readiness for renewed warfare pending US approval, while Iran seized two commercial vessels in retaliation and the Tehran regime paralyzed by succession crisis as hardliners block ceasefire negotiations.
